degree_class: LM-DATA (Class of Master Degrees in Data Science)
academic_requirements: Freely accessible to graduate students, subject to having previously earned at least 30 ECTS in Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or Physics. A bachelor's degree (or equivalent foreign qualification) is required. Admission is 'open with entry requirements examination' — curricular requirements are verified, and personal preparation is assessed. The programme is designed for students from Natural Sciences to Social Sciences and Economics.
language_requirements: Minimum B2 level of English required for admission. B2 knowledge can be verified through: (a) certification issued by the University or an institution accredited by the University corresponding to level B2 (IELTS, TOEFL, Cambridge, etc.); (b) the Open Badge 'English B2' of the University of Milano-Bicocca; (c) an exam of at least 4 CFU in specific scientific disciplines from previous university career taught in English; or (d) a degree programme entirely or mainly taught in English.
entry_exam_or_test: Open access with entry requirements examination. Curricular CFU/ECTS requirements (30 ECTS in Statistics/CS/Math/Physics) are checked first, then personal preparation may be assessed by the admission board. No standardised external test (TOLC/GRE/GMAT) is required.
application_deadline_eu: Unified UNIMIB Master's calls for 2026/2027 (EU citizens and non-EU citizens residing in Italy), per apply.unimib.it: 1st CALL: 10 February 2026 - 31 March 2026; 2nd CALL: 15 April 2026 - 6 July 2026 (EU citizens and non-EU citizens residing in Italy); 3rd CALL: 7 July 2026 - 7 September 2026 (EU citizens and non-EU citizens residing in Italy). Italian-qualification candidates apply via Segreterie OnLine; foreign-qualification candidates apply via apply.unimib.it (Dream Apply).
application_deadline_non_eu: Non-EU citizens requiring a student visa must apply via apply.unimib.it within the earlier Master calls only: 1st CALL: 10 February 2026 - 31 March 2026; 2nd CALL: 15 April 2026 - 6 July 2026. The 3rd CALL (7 July - 7 September 2026) is reserved for EU citizens and non-EU citizens already residing in Italy. English language certification must be submitted by 31 July 2026. Arrival in Italy for visa applicants by 31 January 2027; verification of original documents by 28 February 2027.
required_documents: Identity document (ID card or passport); digital ID photo (min 300x400 px, light background); bachelor's degree certificate / diploma; academic transcript of records (with grades and CFU/ECTS per subject area); English language certification at B2 level (IELTS, TOEFL or equivalent) — exempt for native English speakers and graduates of fully English-taught programmes; CV (recommended); for non-EU applicants: Declaration of Value (DoV) or equivalent CIMEA statement; passport copy for visa applicants.

source_quotes.quote: The language of the master degree is English.
freely accessible to graduate students, subject to having been previously earned 30 ETCS in Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics.
Applicants must demonstrate at least a B2 or higher level of English language knowledge.

Extra-EU citizens requiring a student visa and other candidates with foreign qualifications, whether EU, equivalent, or extra-EU legally residing in Italy, must apply exclusively via https://apply.unimib.it/.
1st CALL: November 7th, 2025 / January 16th, 2026; 2nd CALL: March 16th, 2026 / April 16th, 2026; 3rd CALL: May 15th, 2026 / June 15th, 2026; 4th CALL: July 7th, 2026 / September 7th, 2026.

uncertainty_notes: Exact accepted IELTS/TOEFL minimum scores for Data Science are not published as numeric thresholds on the public 2026/27 page — UNIMIB refers to its general 'accredited B2 certifications' list. Full call-by-call deadline split (EU vs non-EU per call) is taken from the unified Master's 2026/27 announcement on apply.unimib.it; programme-specific PDF for 2026/27 was not directly accessible (403 on apply.unimib.it during fetch). Required-documents list is composed from the central 'MASTER'S DEGREE – Required Documents' page on apply.unimib.it (https://apply.unimib.it/en_GB/news/new/20-masters-degree---required-documents). Deadlines re-verified 2026-06-11 against apply.unimib.it 2026/27 calendar (Master track: 1st CALL 10 Feb - 31 Mar 2026; 2nd CALL 15 Apr - 6 Jul 2026 [EU + non-EU in Italy]; 3rd CALL 7 Jul - 7 Sep 2026 [EU + non-EU in Italy]). The previously inserted 4-call Nov 2025 - Sep 2026 schedule is the Bachelor/single-cycle calendar and was incorrect for this Master.
